_comment: DEMO FIXTURE — synthetic own-lab engagement. Hosts use the RFC 2606 reserved '.example' TLD and RFC 5737 doc IP ranges; nothing here is a real target. Ships with Forge so a fresh install is demoable offline. See README.md in this folder.
notes: Authorized synthetic lab (ACME Retail lab). Non-exploit / non-destructive: findings were obtained by read-only verification (IDOR read of another test tenant, OOB SSRF callback, credentialed CORS read). allow_exploit/allow_destructive stay false — high-impact modules DRY_RUN or VETO. This scope drives the bundled `make demo` / `make demo-purple`.
